title_es: ¡Descubre el Poder Secreto del Aceite de Oliva!
hook_en: Did you know olive oil is nature's ibuprofen?
hook_es: ¿Sabías que el aceite de oliva es el ibuprofeno natural?
key_message: Extra Virgin Olive Oil contains oleocanthal, a natural anti-inflammatory similar to ibuprofen. Use it as a finishing oil to preserve its benefits.
visual_elements: Pouring olive oil on salad as dressing
props_needed: bottle of extra virgin olive oil
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Olive Oil (Extra Virgin) — Contains oleocanthal — a natural anti-inflammatory with effects similar to ibuprofen (Tip: Use for finishing/dressings — high heat degrades beneficial polyphenols)

title_es: Aceite de Oliva: Maximiza Sus Beneficios
hook_es: ¡Deja de arruinar tu aceite de oliva!
key_message: High heat can degrade olive oil's beneficial polyphenols. Use it for cold dishes or as a finishing touch.
visual_elements: Pan on stove with olive oil and high heat warning
Switch to pouring over a finished dish
props_needed: bottle of extra virgin olive oil
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Olive Oil (Extra Virgin) — Contains oleocanthal — a natural anti-inflammatory with effects similar to ibuprofen (Tip: Use for finishing/dressings — high heat degrades beneficial polyphenols)
